output.sources_yml_content:
version: 2

sources:
  - name: payment
    database: DW
    schema: RAW
    description: Payment system source tables
    loader: fivetran
    loaded_at_field: UPDATED_AT
    freshness:
      warn_after: {count: 24, period: hour}
      error_after: {count: 48, period: hour}
    tables:
      - name: PAYMENT_TRANSACTION
        description: Raw payment transaction records from the payment processing system.
        columns:
          - name: PAYMENT_ID
            tests:
              - not_null
              - unique

decision_log.decision: Added PAYMENT_TRANSACTION to existing payment source group
decision_log.rationale: The payment source group already exists in sources.yml. Added PAYMENT_TRANSACTION as a new table entry with freshness check on UPDATED_AT (warn after 24h, error after 48h).
